first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical. Both give the same score (3/10) and cite the exact same critical, job-relevant reason for rejection: a fundamental lack of the required 8 years of C++ experience. Minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and secondary concerns are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment based on the candidate's university.
